Module 5

Let's talk make-up - Eyes

Lesson 1 - The eye pencil

OBC eye pencil

What it looks like:

Product overview

THE EYE PENCIL

Maximise the power of the gaze with the OBC eye pencil, that offers precise and uniform strokes with a creamy and smooth texture to create intense and magnetic eye looks.

A gentle and long-lasting formula specifically designed for the eye area, coming brown and black.

Easy to apply and also blur, allowing for different looks. Perfect for a bold line, but also easy to blend for an intriguing smokey eye effect.

Enriched with a mix of:

  • Jojoba oil, which is a quick absorbing emollient that is known to hydrate and enhance skin elasticity.
  • Ester, which is lightweight with a dry touch and distinct emollient properties.
  • Natural-origin waxes, that provide structure and creaminess to the product.
  • Gamma oryzanol, which has antioxidant properties that protects the skin from oxidative stress and photoaging.
  • Spherical silica, for a soft-focus effect.

What it does

  • Defines the eyes with precise, even lines.
  • Creates intense eye looks with smooth, creamy application.
  • Can be worn sharp or blended for a softer look.
  • Lasts well while still being gentle on the eye area.
  • Gives a soft-focus, smooth finish around the eyes.

How to use it

For definition:

  • Apply along the lash line for a bold, clean look.

For a smokey effect:

  • Apply and gently blur before it sets.

Who is it for

Customers who:

  • Want defined or dramatic eye looks.
  • Like flexible products (line or blend).
  • Want an easy-to-use eye pencil.
  • Want a smokey eye without extra products.
  • Prefer classic shades like black or brown.

How to sell

  • "This glides on easily and gives strong colour."
  • "You can keep the line sharp or blend it for a smokey look."
  • "It's long-lasting but still gentle on the eyes."
  • "Great for everyday eyes or more dramatic looks."

Top Tip

Blend straight after applying for a softer, smokier finish.

When to recommend

Recommend this when a customer wants easy eye definition or a simple smokey eye using one product.

Test your knowledge

Learning Scenario (4 decisions): "I want defined eyes, but not complicated make-up"

Set the scene

A customer says:

C
"I want my eyes to look more defined, but I'm not great at eye make-up. I'd like something easy that can also look a bit smokey."

Your goal: Recommend the right product and explain how to use it simply.

Knowledge check

1. Decision 1: Identify the customer's goal. What is the customer mainly looking for?

2. Decision 2: Choose the right product. Which product best matches this need?

3. Decision 3: Explain how to use it. The customer asks: "How do I use it for different looks?" What is the best response?

4. Decision 4: Close the recommendation. Choose the best closing line:

Choose an answer, then check the question.

Lesson 2 - Volumising mascara

Volumising mascara

What it looks like:

Product overview

An eyelash serum that transforms into a mascara with an extraordinary definition and volume effect, to give an intense gaze and perfectly groomed lashes in one simple step.

The soft and creamy formula instantly delivers an intense and precise touch of color, adjustable in quantity to flawlessly enhance length and volume.

Has an ergonomic brush that allows for a precise and even application, with little product waste.

The brush's silicone material is hygienically recommended, while the design ensures optimal definition and lash separation.

Thanks to its conical shape: the wide part releases more product for added volume, while the tip enhances length and definition.

Enriched with a Lash Booster Serum, which is a peptide complex that enhances the health, length, and appearance of eyelashes and eyebrows with remarkable results. The lash serum contains:

  • Vitamin-enriched Matrikine Biotinyl-GHK: A peptide that stimulates hair follicles, promoting healthier and stronger growth.
  • Biotin and Panthenol, which play a key role in keratin synthesis, ensuring stronger and more elastic lashes and brows.
  • Plant extracts: They have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that protects lashes from damage caused by free radicals.

What it does

  • Helps protect lashes from damage.
  • Shields lashes against free radicals.
  • Helps keep lashes healthy and strong over time.

Who is it for

Customers who:

  • Want to protect and care for their lashes.
  • Wear mascara regularly.
  • Concerned about lash damage or breakage.
  • Want make-up that also looks after their lashes.

How to sell

  • "This helps protect your lashes while you wear it."
  • "It supports lash health and helps prevent damage."
  • "Great if you wear mascara often and want to care for your lashes."

When to recommend

Recommend this when a customer is worried about lash damage or wears mascara daily.

Test your knowledge

Learning Scenario (4 decisions): "I wear mascara every day and my lashes feel weak"

Set the scene

A customer says:

C
"I wear mascara every day, but I'm worried my lashes are getting damaged. I still want volume though."

Your goal: Recommend the right product and explain the benefit clearly and confidently.

Knowledge check

1. Decision 1: Identify the customer's main concern. What is the customer most worried about?

2. Decision 2: Choose the right product. Which product best matches this concern?

3. Decision 3: Explain what makes it different. The customer asks: "How does it help my lashes?" What is the best response?

4. Decision 4: Close the recommendation. Choose the best closing line:

Choose an answer, then check the question.
